paper_title: On Modular Edge Colourings of Graphs
summary: Conjecture 13 from arXiv:2507.04254 asserts that every $0_k$-graph $G$ satisfies $\chi'_k(G) \leq k + o(k)$, which would match the lower bound and close the gap in the main result of the paper. The source paper itself improves the general upper bound to $\chi'_k(G) \leq 9k$; the conjecture, if true, would yield $\chi'_k(G) \leq k + o(k)$ for all graphs as a corollary via their proof strategy. No follow-up work resolving or partially resolving this specific conjecture was found in the indexed literature as of May 2026.
search_queries: modular edge colouring 0k-graph chromatic index Bonamy Botler 2507.04254
"0_k-graph" OR "0k-graph" modular edge colouring chromatic index 2026 Berthe Bonamy Botler
notes: The conjecture was introduced in December 2025 and no follow-up paper addressing it was found after three targeted web searches and two WebFetch verifications. The related paper arXiv:2510.04334 (on modular chromatic index of random hypergraphs) predates the source and does not address Conjecture 13.
